problem_text_cn: 1456 混合法测定液体的比汽化热。[可供仪器和用具] 水蒸气锅、煤气炉（或电炉）、量热器（含搅拌器）、物理天平、数字式温度计等。[要求] (1) 写出测量水的比汽化热的原理和计算公式；(2) 写出实验方法；(3) 测量并计算水在100℃时的比汽化热。
problem_text_en: 1456 Determine the specific vaporization heat of a liquid using the mixing method. [Available instruments and tools] Steam pot, gas stove (or electric furnace), calorimeter (including stirrer), physical balance, digital thermometer, etc. [Requirements] (1) Write down the principle and calculation formula for measuring the specific vaporization heat of water; (2) Write down the experimental method; (3) Measure and calculate the specific vaporization heat of water at 100℃.
img_cn: 图1456_1：混合法测比汽化热装置及数据处理
img_en: Fig. 1456_1: Mixing method for measuring specific vaporization heat device and data processing
problem_solution_cn: 【核心思路】100℃水蒸气冷凝为水并降温至θ₂，放出热量$ML + Mc_w(\theta_3 - \theta_2)$；量热器和水吸收热量$(mc_w + m_1c_c)(\theta_2 - \theta_1)$，热平衡得$ML + Mc_w(\theta_3 - \theta_2) = (mc_w + m_1c_c)(\theta_2 - \theta_1)$，故$L = \frac{mc_w + m_1c_c}{M}(\theta_2 - \theta_1) - c_w(\theta_3 - \theta_2)$。代入数据：$m = 262.095\ \mathrm{g}$，$m_1 = 143.965\ \mathrm{g}$，$c_w = 4.188\ \mathrm{J/g \cdot ^\circ C}$，$c_c = 0.387\ \mathrm{J/g \cdot ^\circ C}$，$\theta_1 = 2.91\ \mathrm{^\circ C}$，$\theta_2 = 23.88\ \mathrm{^\circ C}$，$\theta_3 = 100.0\ \mathrm{^\circ C}$，$M = 9.420\ \mathrm{g}$，得$L = 2.248 \times 10^6\ \mathrm{J/kg}$，与标准值$2.257 \times 10^6\ \mathrm{J/kg}$百分差约0.4%。
problem_solution_en: 【Core Idea】Water vapor at 100℃ condenses into water and cools to θ₂, releasing heat $ML + Mc_w(\theta_3 - \theta_2)$; calorimeter and water absorb heat $(mc_w + m_1c_c)(\theta_2 - \theta_1)$. Heat balance gives $ML + Mc_w(\theta_3 - \theta_2) = (mc_w + m_1c_c)(\theta_2 - \theta_1)$, so $L = \frac{mc_w + m_1c_c}{M}(\theta_2 - \theta_1) - c_w(\theta_3 - \theta_2)$. Substituting data: $m = 262.095\ \mathrm{g}$, $m_1 = 143.965\ \mathrm{g}$, $c_w = 4.188\ \mathrm{J/g \cdot ^\circ C}$, $c_c = 0.387\ \mathrm{J/g \cdot ^\circ C}$, $\theta_1 = 2.91\ \mathrm{^\circ C}$, $\theta_2 = 23.88\ \mathrm{^\circ C}$, $\theta_3 = 100.0\ \mathrm{^\circ C}$, $M = 9.420\ \mathrm{g}$, get $L = 2.248 \times 10^6\ \mathrm{J/kg}$, with a percentage difference of about 0.4% from the standard value $2.257 \times 10^6\ \mathrm{J/kg}$.
problem_answer: 水的比汽化热：$\boldsymbol{2.248 \times 10^6\ \mathrm{J/kg}}$（100℃）；与标准值百分差：$\boldsymbol{\approx 0.4\%}$；测量关键：预冷量热器，使初温低于露点，减小与外界热交换。
